name_cn:
22cc Spring/Summer Heart Series [Happy]
The heart design is truly super pretty, hard to get even for VIPs at the counter [Crying] with a price premium of several thousand! The real thing is stunning, very stylish no matter how you style it. The hottest series of the season, must buy 👜
Style: AS3191
Size: 18x16.5x6.5cm
Includes packaging
